caption: A man sits in a podcast studio, wearing a white button-down shirt with tan suspenders, a red bowtie, over-the-ear headphones, and a tall, grey, stylized wig. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone. The background consists of a wall adorned with various framed photographs and apparel displays, including a white t-shirt and a black bag. Two logos are visible on the screen: one on the left reading "PODCAST" under a stylized "P" logo, and one on the right reading "GOSS TALK JOY" with a small microphone icon. Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking and gesturing with his right hand, which is partially visible in the first frame. His facial expressions shift slightly as he talks, while his posture remains relatively still against the backdrop of the studio equipment and decor.
